idea-plugin.name: Omarchy Theme Sync
idea-plugin.description:
Sync Omarchy themes with JetBrains IDEs.

Automatically applies your current Omarchy color palette to the IDE UI theme and editor color scheme.

  • Installs and manages an Omarchy theme-set hook.
  • Generates matching IDE theme and editor scheme files.
  • Refreshes the theme automatically when Omarchy changes.
  • Includes a manual Refresh Omarchy Theme action from the Tools menu.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial Marketplace release.
  • Syncs Omarchy theme changes into JetBrains IDE UI and editor colors.

action.description: Reload Omarchy theme data from disk
